Professional A-Frame Sign Hardware for Sidewalk Business Display

The Simpo Sign A-Frame provides durable plastic construction that prevents rust and splinters, making it ideal for outdoor business signage and storefront displays. This professional-grade sign hardware is designed for sidewalk advertising and promotional displays.

A-Frame Sign Hardware Features

  • Durable plastic construction prevents rust and splinters
  • Folds flat for easy transport and storage
  • Molded handle for convenient portability
  • Built-in tabs keep signs securely in place
  • Available in white finish
  • Professional appearance for business displays

A-Frame Sign Dimensions & Specifications

Display Size: 24" W x 36.75" H x 21.5" D
Collapsed Size: 24" W x 36" H x 2.25" D
Weight: 9 lbs
Material: Durable plastic construction
Color: White frame only

Note: Signs sold separately. This listing includes A-frame hardware only.

PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

A-Frame Sign Hardware Material & Construction Details

Our Simpo Sign A-Frame is constructed from high-quality plastic materials specifically engineered for outdoor business signage applications.

Plastic Construction Benefits

  • Rust-Proof: Unlike metal frames, plastic construction eliminates rust concerns
  • Splinter-Free: Smooth plastic surface prevents splintering and injury
  • Weather Resistant: Designed to withstand outdoor conditions
  • Lightweight: Easy to move and reposition for different displays
  • Low Maintenance: Simple cleaning with soap and water

Frame Specifications

The A-frame hardware features reinforced joints and molded construction for maximum durability. The white finish provides a clean, professional appearance that complements any sign design.

This hardware is specifically designed to work with standard sidewalk sign inserts and can accommodate various sign materials including coroplast, aluminum, and other rigid substrates.

A-Frame Sign Hardware Setup & Assembly Options

The Simpo Sign A-Frame arrives ready to use with minimal setup required. The frame features user-friendly design elements for quick deployment.

Assembly Features

  • No Tools Required: Simple fold-out design for immediate use
  • Secure Sign Tabs: Built-in tabs hold signs firmly in place
  • Adjustable Positioning: Frame allows for optimal sign viewing angles
  • Quick Breakdown: Folds flat in seconds for storage

Sign Mounting Compatibility

This A-frame hardware is compatible with:

  • Coroplast signs (recommended thickness: 4mm)
  • Aluminum signs
  • Rigid PVC signs
  • Other rigid substrate materials

The frame's tab system securely holds signs without additional hardware or fasteners. Signs slide easily into position and remain stable during outdoor display.

A-Frame Sign Hardware Compatibility & Sign Requirements

This A-frame hardware is designed to work with standard sidewalk sign formats and various sign materials.

Compatible Sign Dimensions

The frame accommodates signs with the following specifications:

  • Maximum Sign Size: 24" W x 36" H
  • Recommended Materials: Coroplast (4mm), aluminum, rigid PVC
  • Material Thickness: Up to 6mm thick materials
  • Sign Weight: Supports lightweight to medium-weight sign materials

Sign Design Considerations

  • Design for outdoor visibility with bold text and high contrast
  • Consider viewing distance when selecting font sizes
  • Account for wind resistance in sign material selection
  • Leave adequate margins for the frame's tab system

Sign Ordering Information

This listing includes A-frame hardware only. Signs are sold separately and can be ordered through our custom sign services.

Our design team can help create effective sidewalk signage that maximizes the impact of your A-frame display. Contact us for sign design and production services.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Frequently Asked Questions About A-Frame Sign Hardware

What signs work with this A-frame hardware?

The Simpo Sign A-Frame accommodates signs up to 24" W x 36" H in materials like coroplast, aluminum, and rigid PVC. Signs up to 6mm thick work best with the frame's tab system.

Is the A-frame suitable for outdoor use?

Yes, the durable plastic construction is designed for outdoor applications. The material resists rust, splinters, and weather damage while maintaining its professional appearance.

How portable is this A-frame hardware?

Very portable. The frame weighs only 9 lbs, includes a molded handle, and folds flat to just 2.25" deep for easy transport and storage.

Do I need tools to set up the A-frame?

No tools required. The A-frame unfolds quickly and signs slide into the built-in tabs without additional hardware or fasteners.

Can I order signs separately?

Yes, this listing is for hardware only. Signs are available separately through our custom sign services. Contact us to coordinate sign production with your A-frame order.

What colors are available for the A-frame?

The Simpo Sign A-Frame is available in white only, providing a clean, professional appearance that complements any sign design.

How much weight can the A-frame support?

The frame is designed for lightweight to medium-weight sign materials. Standard coroplast and aluminum signs work perfectly within the frame's weight capacity.

Is assembly required?

No assembly required. The A-frame ships ready to use and simply unfolds for immediate deployment.
